name: WE RIIZE
overview: "WE RIIZE" is a variety show featuring the members of the K-pop group RIIZE engaging in entertaining activities, providing fans a closer look at the group's dynamics outside of their musical performances.

trailers.title: WE RIIZE HIGH! ❮그럼 우리 이렇게 일곱 명이 같은 반인가?❯ | WE RIIZE EP.1
